facial_anchors.features: Clean-cut, refined Asian facial structure, narrow jawline, focused and calm gaze
facial_anchors.mouth: Neutral to slight 'spring breeze' smile, thin lips
facial_anchors.hair: Clean-shaven Buddhist monk (short black stubble visible)
facial_anchors.skin: Fair, smooth, realistic skin pores visible under soft light

costume_anchors.outer_robe: Charcoal/Dark grey linen texture, loose-fitting monastic style
costume_anchors.aesthetic: Zen minimalism, no ornaments, strictly monastic

visual_quality_spec: 8K, 35mm film grain, Low-key cinematic lighting, Volume light (Tyndall effect), soft natural highlights, high texture detail for fabric and skin.
